LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STEPHEN BOWKER'S MOTION TO DISMISS APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO MAY 12, 2008, TO GIVE DEFENDANT A FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO OBTAIN A BOND.
